query: What is the best way to get in touch with supplier1?
reasoning: The query requires a comprehensive understanding of the contact information and related history with supplier1. Therefore, all available agents will be utilized to gather relevant information from emails, CRM contacts, and location data.

steps.task: Search for emails and calendar events related to supplier1 to find any prior communications or meetings.
Look up CRM contacts related to supplier1 to gather contact information and any relevant CRM history.
Retrieve location and any store or site information related to supplier1 that may aid in communication.

synthesis: Combine the results from all three agents to provide a comprehensive answer regarding the best ways to contact supplier1, considering past communications, CRM details, and relevant location information.
